name: Michael Hayden
administration: George W. Bush and Obama Administrations
summary: Former CIA and NSA Director who warned that Trump's style did not fit the intelligence community and said intelligence would be "dead" under another Trump term.

keyStatements.quote: None of that fits into the intelligence picture.
keyStatements.context: On Trump's approach to facts and intelligence

keyStatements.quote: If there was another Trump administration, intelligence would be dead.

timeline.event: Became first Director of National Intelligence
Warned about Trump and intelligence culture
Signed GOP national security endorsement of Biden
Warned intelligence would be "dead" under another Trump term
timeline.significance: Sharp warning about a second Trump term

credibility.background: Former CIA Director, NSA Director, Air Force general, decades in intelligence
positions: Principal Deputy Director of National Intelligence (2005-2006)

oppositionReasons: Said Trump's approach does not fit intelligence culture
Warned intelligence would be "dead" under another Trump term
Signed letter calling Trump unfit to serve another term
endorsement: Signed 2020 national security officials' endorsement of Biden

sources.title: Why Gen. Michael Hayden thinks President-elect Donald Trump doesn't fit into "intelligence picture"
Former CIA director says intelligence community will recover under Biden
Over 70 Republican National Security Officials Endorse Biden, Deem Trump 'Dangerously Unfit' For President
